label: Red — Critical
staffing: 1 vet per 1-2 patients + assisting nurse standby

label: Orange — High Risk / Unstable
criteria: At risk of deterioration (moderate-severe dehydration, tachypnea, borderline BP)
On continuous IV fluids or infusion
Requires frequent reassessment for treatment response
staffing: 1 vet per 3-4 patients + nurse monitoring support

label: Yellow — Moderate
urgency: Fairly stable but needs close care
criteria: On IV fluids or scheduled meds
Needs feeding, medication, and output monitoring

label: Blue — Observation / Boarding
criteria: Needs basic care, feeding, medication, or wound dressing
staffing: Primarily nurse care, vet check as scheduled
